title: dugandia rostrata
intro: Dugandia rostrata is a plant species native to South America, specifically in the Andean region, and is also known as 'Sneezewort' due to its historical use as a treatment for colds and allergies. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. Its health benefits include soothing respiratory issues, reducing fever, and acting as a natural expectorant to relieve congestion. Dugandia rostrata is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it's also used in herbal remedies to create topical creams and ointments for skin issues.
